fields.title: curated memory: add crash-safe lock recovery
fields.description: Persistent Curated Memory currently uses an exclusive .lock file with timeout-based acquisition and no stale-lock reaping. This preserves correctness across concurrent tau processes, but a crash while holding the lock can leave memory mutations blocked until the lock file is removed. Follow-up: design a crash-safe lock recovery strategy (e.g. PID metadata + liveness checks, heartbeat/mtime renewal, or robust advisory locking) that preserves cross-process serialization.
fields.close_reason: Implemented crash-safe curated-memory lock recovery with PID/token metadata, heartbeat-based stale reaping, regression tests, and passing gate.
